title: Spicy Moroccan Frankfurter Briouat
description: A fusion of Moroccan and American flavors, this indulgent briouat wraps a spicy frankfurter in flaky pastry, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Roll out the briouat pastry sheets to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the pastry into squares, about 3 inches per side.
Place a frankfurter in the center of each square.
Add chopped onion, grated ginger, cumin, cayenne pepper (if using), and salt on top of the frankfurter.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Fold the pastry over the frankfurter, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the briouats on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with the remaining egg wash.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
